moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships are in their final week, with the Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles Finals scheduled for July 12th.

angles.name: Centre Court Drama
angles.copy: Who's making it to Centre Court this weekend? The Wimbledon finals are just days away! #Wimbledon

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: As Wimbledon 2026 reaches its climax, are British hopes still alive in the singles draws? Tune in!

angles.name: Finals Weekend Buzz
angles.copy: The biggest weekend in tennis is almost here! Who are you backing for the Wimbledon titles?

moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins its practice days at Royal Birkdale on July 12th, with the main tournament running from July 16-19.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest Stage
angles.copy: The world's best golfers are gathering at Royal Birkdale as The Open Championship officially begins its practice days this Sunday. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Birkdale Ready
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is primed and ready! The Open Championship practice days start July 12th. Any dark horses you're watching?

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival
moments.blurb: Birmingham's Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival kicks off this Friday, July 10th, running until July 12th in Moseley Park.

angles.name: Birmingham Beats
angles.copy: Moseley Park is about to get soulful! The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival starts this Friday in Birmingham.

angles.name: Weekend Grooves
angles.copy: Your weekend soundtrack sorted! Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival brings the vibes to Birmingham from July 10-12.

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival takes place in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland, from July 15-18, featuring a diverse lineup of music and culture.

angles.name: Island Festival
angles.copy: Heading to the Outer Hebrides? The Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off next Wednesday with four days of incredible music and culture! #HebCelt

angles.name: Celtic Sounds
angles.copy: Get ready for some amazing Celtic vibes! The Hebridean Celtic Festival is just around the corner, starting July 15th.

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival
moments.blurb: Alexandra Palace's Kaleidoscope Festival returns for a day of music, comedy, and arts on July 11th.

angles.name: Ally Pally Fun
angles.copy: Alexandra Palace is hosting Kaleidoscope Festival this Saturday! A huge day of music, comedy, and more. Who's going?

angles.name: London Calling
angles.copy: One day, all the fun! Kaleidoscope Festival lands at Ally Pally this weekend. Get your tickets!

moments.title: Official Singles Chart #1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is currently the UK's Official Singles Chart Number 1, as of the week ending July 9, 2026.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Big news on the Official Singles Chart! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are still holding strong at Number 1 with 'Rein Me In'. Deserved?

angles.name: Tune of the Week
angles.copy: Still can't get enough of 'Rein Me In'? Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are this week's UK Number 1! What's your favourite track on the chart?

moments.title: Little House on the Prairie Reboot
moments.blurb: A new adaptation of 'Little House on the Prairie' arrives on Netflix on July 9th.

angles.name: Nostalgia Watch
angles.copy: Get ready to revisit the Ingalls family! A new 'Little House on the Prairie' adaptation drops on Netflix tomorrow. Will you be watching?

angles.name: Family Drama
angles.copy: New on Netflix from July 9th: 'Little House on the Prairie'. Perfect for some cosy family viewing.

moments.title: ITV Thriller 'The Dark'
moments.blurb: The new ITV thriller 'The Dark', starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale, is airing this July.

angles.name: New Crime Drama
angles.copy: Looking for a new series to get stuck into? ITV's moody thriller 'The Dark' is on this month. Anyone hooked yet?

angles.name: Scottish Mystery
angles.copy: A new thriller set in the Scottish wilderness is on ITV this July. 'The Dark' promises plenty of suspense!

moments.title: Happy 56th to Beck
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Beck, known for his genre-bending sound, turns 56 today, July 8th.

angles.name: Modern Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 56th birthday to the one and only Beck! What's your favourite track from the 'Loser' hitmaker?

angles.name: Genre Bender
angles.copy: He's 56 today! Celebrate Beck's birthday with us – a true innovator in music.

moments.title: Jaden Smith Turns 28
moments.blurb: Actor and rapper Jaden Smith celebrates his 28th birthday today, July 8th.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 28th birthday to Jaden Smith! What's your favourite of his tracks?

angles.name: Artist & Activist
angles.copy: Jaden Smith turns 28 today! From film to music to activism, a multi-talented force.

moments.title: Jack White is 51

angles.name: Garage Rock Legend

angles.name: Happy Birthday Jack
angles.copy: From The White Stripes to solo stardom, Jack White turns 51 tomorrow! Send him some birthday love!

moments.title: Neil Tennant Turns 71

angles.name: Pop Icon

angles.name: Birthday Rock

angles.copy: Friday is Richie Sambora's 67th birthday! An essential part of Bon Jovi's classic sound.

moments.title: Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: School summer holidays have started or are beginning this week across much of the UK.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: It's official: summer holidays are here for many! Wishing everyone a fantastic break. What are your plans?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: School's out for summer! If you're looking for ideas to keep the kids entertained, we've got you covered.
